## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm test` pass
- [ ] `npm run validate && npm run build` pass and generated files are committed
- [ ] If effects were added/changed: regenerated posters (`npm run posters`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and bumped `version` in `package.json` (if shipping)
- [ ] New/changed motion honors `prefers-reduced-motion`
